{{Quote|Putting an end to a three-month scandal in the halls of higher learning on Alderaan, Provost Dalus Othona formally censured and suspended Dean Halcor Raystel.|HoloNet News article spotlighting Halcor Raystel|<ref name="HNN" />}}
'''Dalus Othona''' was the [[Provost/Legends|Provost]] of the [[University of Alderaan/Legends|University of]] [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]<ref name="HNN" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|47|life/13314_2.html|Dean of Aldera Suspended}} is set on the date [[Great ReSynchronization|13:3:14]], which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] per the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], the [[University/Legends|university's]] [[Dean/Legends|Dean]], [[Halcor Raystel]], caused a three-[[Standard month/Legends|month]] scandal when it came to light that he was addicted to [[Ryll/Legends|ryll]] [[Spice/Legends|spice]] and had offered class credits in exchange for [[Reproduction/Legends|sexual]] favors to two [[Gender/Legends|female]] students. Following an investigation into the matter, Othona censured and suspended Raystel from office.<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dalus Othona was mentioned in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #47'']], an [[in-universe]] [[HoloNet News (original website)|website]]<ref name="HNN" /> published on [[March 14]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN47 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6042498|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-14|time=5:40 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref> [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]] wrote the site content.<ref name="HNN Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref>
